executive_summary: CRITICAL BUG: PerceptionPipeline stored detector as private `_detector` but main.py checked for public `detect`/`detector` — attribute lookup always failed → `detector_fn=None` → 0 detections on every frame (2290+ frames observed).

SECONDARY BUG: `create_perception_pipeline(use_mock=False)` called without `use_yolo=True`/`use_midas=True` — factory defaulted both to False, always creating MockObjectDetector even when real ONNX models could be used.
MODEL FILES MISSING: Neither `models/yolov8n.onnx` nor `models/midas_v21_small_256.onnx` exist on disk. Real inference impossible until `python scripts/download_models.py` is run.
OCR BACKEND NOT INSTALLED: easyocr/pytesseract libraries not installed despite being in requirements.txt → text reading completely non-functional.

ALL CRITICAL FIXES APPLIED: Public API added to PerceptionPipeline (.detect(), .estimate_depth(), .detector, .depth_estimator properties). Factory now auto-detects model files. CI smoke test suite (18 tests) validates the wiring will never regress.
NEXT STEP: Run `python scripts/download_models.py` to enable real YOLO+MiDaS inference, then `pip install easyocr>=1.7.0` for OCR, then `python app.py dev` to verify live detections.

root_causes.title: Pipeline attribute mismatch — detector_fn always None
root_causes.symptom: detections_count=0, modules_ok=0, modules_failed=0, latency_ms=0.0 on ALL 2290+ frames
root_causes.evidence: main.py checks `hasattr(pipeline, 'detect')` and `hasattr(pipeline, 'detector')`. PerceptionPipeline stores `self._detector` (private underscore) and exposes `.process()` not `.detect()`. Both checks return False → detector_fn stays None → frame_orchestrator.process_frame() creates zero tasks.
root_causes.fix_description: Added public properties (.detector, .depth_estimator, .segmenter) and delegation methods (.detect(), .estimate_depth()) to PerceptionPipeline class.

root_causes.title: create_perception_pipeline never receives use_yolo/use_midas flags
root_causes.symptom: Pipeline always creates MockObjectDetector (fake 1-3 detections) instead of real YOLODetector
root_causes.evidence: Call was `create_perception_pipeline(use_mock=False)` with no YOLO/MiDaS flags. Factory function `create_pipeline()` defaults `use_yolo=False, use_midas=False` → always MockObjectDetector.
root_causes.fix_description: 1) main.py now resolves spatial_config 'auto' string to True/False based on model file existence, then passes use_yolo/use_midas to factory. 2) Factory itself now auto-detects model files when flags are False and use_mock is also False.

root_causes.title: ONNX model files not present on disk
root_causes.symptom: Even with RC-1 and RC-2 fixed, YOLODetector and MiDaSDepthEstimator cannot load (FileNotFoundError) and fall back to mock/simple estimators
root_causes.evidence: Test-Path models/yolov8n.onnx → False, Test-Path models/midas_v21_small_256.onnx → False
root_causes.fix_description: Run `python scripts/download_models.py` — downloads YOLOv8n (~6 MB) and MiDaS v2.1 small (~40 MB). Auto-detect logic in factory will then enable real inference.

root_causes.title: OCR backend libraries not installed
root_causes.symptom: Log: 'NO OCR BACKEND AVAILABLE. Text reading will not work.'
root_causes.evidence: easyocr and pytesseract are in requirements.txt but neither has been pip-installed.
root_causes.fix_description: pip install easyocr>=1.7.0 (or pytesseract>=0.3.10 + tesseract binary)

root_causes.title: ElevenLabs websocket closed unexpectedly
root_causes.symptom: Log: 'websocket closed unexpectedly' from livekit.plugins.elevenlabs after worker shutdown
root_causes.evidence: May be a consequence of worker shutdown (RC-6) rather than an independent bug. ElevenLabs SDK has known websocket fragility.
root_causes.fix_description: Add TTS retry with exponential backoff, or add fallback TTS provider (e.g., Google Cloud TTS)
root_causes.priority: P2 — investigate after RC-1..RC-4 are resolved

root_causes.title: Worker shuts down when participant disconnects in dev mode
root_causes.evidence: Expected behavior in livekit dev mode — worker lifecycle tied to participant session.
root_causes.fix_description: For production, configure LIVEKIT_AGENT_KEEP_ALIVE=true or use agent dispatch mode

fixes_applied.description: Added public API to PerceptionPipeline: .detect(), .estimate_depth(), .detector, .depth_estimator, .segmenter properties. These delegate to the private _detector/_depth_estimator/_segmenter members so main.py's hasattr() checks succeed.
fixes_applied.diff_summary: +28 lines in PerceptionPipeline class between is_ready property and process() method

fixes_applied.description: Rewrote detector_fn/depth_fn wiring logic in _continuous_consumer setup. Now checks .detect() first (primary path), then falls back to .detector.detect() (secondary). Added diagnostic logging: 'detector_fn WIRED' or 'detector_fn is None' at startup.
fixes_applied.diff_summary: Replaced 12-line block with 25-line block (added fallback chains + logging)

fixes_applied.description: VQA Engine init now resolves spatial_config 'auto' → True/False based on os.path.isfile(model_path), then passes explicit use_yolo/use_midas booleans to create_perception_pipeline().
fixes_applied.diff_summary: Replaced 1-line call with 14-line config resolution block

fixes_applied.description: create_pipeline() factory now auto-detects YOLO/MiDaS model files on disk when use_yolo=False and use_mock=False. Checks YOLO_MODEL_PATH and MIDAS_MODEL_PATH env vars with 'models/' fallback.
fixes_applied.diff_summary: +12 lines of auto-detection logic in create_pipeline()

fixes_remaining.title: Download ONNX model files
fixes_remaining.description: Downloads YOLOv8n ONNX (~6 MB) and MiDaS v2.1 small ONNX (~40 MB) to models/ directory. Without these, system uses MockObjectDetector (fake detections) instead of real YOLO inference.

fixes_remaining.title: Install OCR backend
fixes_remaining.description: Enables text reading capability. easyocr is already in requirements.txt but not installed.

fixes_remaining.title: Add CI smoke test to pipeline
fixes_remaining.description: 18-test suite that validates: (1) PerceptionPipeline public API contract, (2) create_pipeline wiring, (3) orchestrator detector_fn resolution, (4) end-to-end frame→detection count>0, (5) OCR import health, (6) shared type integrity. Add to CI: `pytest tests/test_ci_smoke.py --timeout=60`

fixes_remaining.title: ElevenLabs TTS retry/fallback
fixes_remaining.description: Add exponential backoff retry wrapper around TTS synthesis. Consider adding fallback TTS provider (Google Cloud TTS, pyttsx3 offline).

fixes_remaining.title: LiveKit agent keep-alive for production
fixes_remaining.description: Configure agent dispatch mode or keep-alive to survive participant disconnects in production deployments.

test_classes.name: TestPerceptionPipelineAPI
test_classes.validates: PerceptionPipeline exposes .detect(), .estimate_depth(), .detector, .depth_estimator, .segmenter and they return correct types

test_classes.name: TestCreatePipeline
test_classes.validates: Factory function creates pipeline with working detector (both mock and non-mock)

test_classes.name: TestOrchestratorWiring
test_classes.validates: Exact main.py wiring logic resolves detector_fn and depth_fn to non-None callables — PREVENTS REGRESSION of the zero-detection bug

test_classes.name: TestOrchestratorDetections
test_classes.validates: End-to-end: TimestampedFrame → FrameOrchestrator.process_frame() → detections_count > 0, modules_succeeded includes 'detection'

test_classes.name: TestOCRHealth
test_classes.validates: OCR module imports cleanly, backend availability flags exist

test_classes.name: TestSharedTypes
test_classes.validates: Detection, BoundingBox, PerceptionResult dataclasses are importable and constructable

Pipeline.estimate_depth() returns None when no depth_estimator
create_pipeline(use_mock=False) auto-detects YOLO model on disk
process_frame with mock detector produces >0 detections
SceneGraph is built when detections exist
MockObjectDetector returns 1-3 detections for any image
YOLODetector with valid ONNX model detects persons/chairs/etc
YOLODetector with invalid model path falls back to mock
MiDaS estimator with ONNX model produces metric-like depth
Depth map dimensions match image size / 4
OCR with easyocr backend reads text from image
OCR with pytesseract backend reads text from image
OCR with no backend logs error but does not crash
Face detection with GDPR consent check
Face embedding with encryption at rest
GDPR erase removes all personal data
Priority hazard detection (near obstacles get higher priority)
Speech → VQA query → speech response round-trip
Context from memory improves answer quality
Scene nodes have correct spatial relations
Fernet AES encryption encrypts/decrypts FAISS index
GDPR export endpoint returns all personal data
GDPR erase endpoint deletes all personal data
Frame processing logs frame_id and metrics
Error responses have correct HTTP status codes
ONNX runtime not installed → fallback to mock

perf_recommendations.recommendation: Adaptive cadence: 100ms when moving, 500ms when stationary. Use accelerometer or frame-diff to detect motion.
perf_recommendations.impact: 5x reduction in processing load when stationary

perf_recommendations.recommendation: Use onnxruntime-gpu if CUDA available, or onnxruntime with OpenVINO EP for Intel devices. Set ORT_NUM_THREADS=2 for mobile.
Run 3-5 warm-up inferences with varied image sizes to populate all ONNX caches

perf_recommendations.current: All modules run in parallel per frame
perf_recommendations.recommendation: Add module priority: detection first, then depth/segmentation only if detections found. Skip OCR/QR if no text-like regions detected.
perf_recommendations.impact: 30-50% reduction in per-frame compute for empty scenes

perf_recommendations.recommendation: Call gc.collect() every 100 frames. Use numpy memory pool. Limit FAISS index size with MaxHeapSize.
perf_recommendations.impact: Prevents memory growth over long sessions

structured_logging.format: JSON (auto-detect) with component, latency_ms, detections_count fields
key_events: detector_fn_wired — at startup, confirms detector is connected

recommendations: Add Prometheus /metrics endpoint with: frames_processed_total, detections_per_frame histogram, pipeline_latency_ms histogram, ocr_success_rate gauge
Add OpenTelemetry tracing spans for: frame_capture → detection → depth → fusion → scene_graph → TTS
Add alerting rule: if avg(detections_per_frame) == 0 for >30s, fire P1 alert

endpoints: POST /export/data — exports all personal data as JSON
DELETE /export/erase — deletes all personal data (right to erasure)

face_consent.workflow: Opt-in required before face recognition. Consent stored in identities.json.

items: Run: python app.py dev — verify detections_count > 0 in logs
Add TTS retry/fallback for ElevenLabs websocket failures
Performance benchmark: target <300ms per frame E2E
LiveKit agent dispatch mode for production scaling
